auth.loginSubtitle: Login to access your farming dashboard

dashboard.subtitle: Here's your farming dashboard for today

cropCare.title: Crop Disease Detection
cropCare.subtitle: Upload a crop or leaf image to identify diseases and get treatment recommendations.
cropCare.upload: Click to upload or drag & drop
cropCare.uploadPrompt: Upload an image to see analysis results
cropCare.hotspotsNear: {{count}} disease hotspot(s) detected near your area. Check the map below.
cropCare.selectImage: Please select an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)
cropCare.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser

assistant.title: AI Farming Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask any farming question in your language.
assistant.welcome: Namaste! I am your AI Farming Assistant. I can help you with farming advice, financial guidance, government schemes, weather information, and more. How can I help you today?
assistant.q1: What crops should I plant this season?
assistant.q2: How do I improve my soil health?
assistant.q3: What government schemes are available for farmers?
assistant.q4: How can I protect my crops from pests?

weather.title: Weather Advisory
weather.subtitle: Get weather forecasts and farming advisories for your area.

water.title: Water Footprint Calculator
water.subtitle: Calculate your crop's water needs based on conditions.
water.tip1: Use drip irrigation to save up to 60% water compared to flood irrigation.
water.tip2: Mulching reduces evaporation and keeps soil moist longer.
water.tip3: Water early morning or late evening to minimize evaporation losses.
water.tip4: Maintain soil organic matter to improve water retention capacity.

market.title: Market Price Analysis
market.subtitle: Explore real-time agricultural market prices and trends.
market.noResults: No market data found for selected criteria.

schemes.title: Government Schemes
schemes.subtitle: Learn about agricultural schemes and government support for farmers.
schemes.welcome: Welcome! I can help you learn about government agricultural schemes. Click a scheme button below or type your question.

equipment.title: Equipment Rental
equipment.subtitle: Browse and rent farm equipment at affordable rates.
equipment.awaitingConfirm: Booking request sent! Awaiting owner confirmation.
equipment.notListed: You haven't listed any equipment yet.
equipment.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number

payment.title: How would you like to receive payment?
payment.cashDesc: Meet in person and collect cash
payment.cashAgreed: Cash payment agreed. Contact the renter to arrange meetup.
payment.upiDesc: Share UPI ID or QR code with renter
payment.scanQR: Renter can scan this QR to pay
payment.bankDesc: Share bank account details for NEFT/IMPS transfer

waste.title: Crop Waste Exchange
waste.subtitle: Buy and sell crop waste — turn agricultural byproducts into income.
waste.noListings: No listings yet. Be the first to add one!

education.title: Farming Education
education.subtitle: Learn modern farming techniques, government schemes, and sustainable agriculture practices.
education.noVideos: No videos found matching your search.
education.tip1: Test your soil health regularly - at least once every cropping season for optimal yield.
education.tip2: Use drip irrigation to save up to 60% water compared to traditional flood irrigation.
education.tip3: Rotate crops each season to prevent soil nutrient depletion and reduce pest buildup.
education.tip4: Apply neem oil as a natural pesticide to protect crops without harmful chemicals.

community.title: Farmer Community
community.subtitle: Share knowledge, ask questions, and connect with fellow farmers.
community.questionPlaceholder: What do you want to ask?
community.detailsPlaceholder: Provide more details about your question...
community.question: Question
community.noAnswers: No answers yet. Be the first to help!
community.noPosts: No posts yet. Be the first to share!

donation.title: Support Farmers
donation.subtitle: Your contribution helps empower Indian farmers with AI-powered tools and resources.
donation.impact1: Provides AI disease diagnosis for 50 farmers
donation.impact2: Delivers water-saving insights for 100 acre farms
donation.impact3: Provides farming education kits for a village
donation.impact4: Sponsors a farmer for an entire season
donation.scanHint: Scan this QR code with any UPI app to complete your donation.

landing.heroSubtitle: Disease detection, market prices, weather forecasts, and AI assistance — all in one app.
landing.step1Desc: Upload crop photos or ask farming questions in your language
landing.step2Desc: Our AI models detect diseases, predict weather, and fetch market data
landing.step3Desc: Receive actionable recommendations to improve your farming outcomes
